Ships Across Egypt

The Valyria Philosophy

Why 30ml?

"Because your scent should evolve with you — not trap you."

Most perfume brands sell you 100ml because they want you to commit to one scent for years. At Valyria, we believe luxury is about freedom of choice — not obligation.

30ml gives you the full experience of a premium Eau de Parfum — the longevity, the depth, the statement — while leaving room in your life to explore more than one signature scent.

Try Night Pulse for the weekend. Wear Frozen Fire to a meeting. Switch to Dragon Stone for a night out. With 30ml, you can own a wardrobe of scents without hesitation.

🗝️
Freedom
Own more than one scent
30ml is the perfect size to build a scent wardrobe — one for day, one for night, one for occasions. Why limit yourself to just one?
✈️
Portable
Luxury that goes everywhere
Compact enough for your bag, your gym kit, your desk drawer. 30ml means your signature scent is always within reach.
💎
No Fear
Try bold. Try different. Try new.
When a bottle is affordable enough to explore, you stop playing it safe. 30ml gives you the courage to try a scent you've never dared to wear.
🏔️
Full Strength
Same formula. Same power. Smaller bottle.
Our 30ml is the exact same Eau de Parfum concentration as any 100ml bottle on the market. Zero compromise on quality, depth, or longevity.

"لأن عطرك لازم يتطور معاك — مش يحبسك."

30 مل هو الاختيار الأذكى — يديك كل تجربة الأو دو بارفان الفاخرة، بس بيخليك حر تجرب أكتر من عطر بدون خوف. اشتري Night Pulse للأسبوع، Frozen Fire للشغل، Dragon Stone للسهرة. مع 30 مل، تقدر تبني كوليكشن كامل بدون تفكير زيادة.

Est. 2025 · Egypt

Our Story

Born from a
Question

Valyria Scent was not born in a boardroom. It was born from a question that refused to go away: "Why should luxury always come from somewhere else?"

We looked at the perfume world and saw shelves full of foreign names at impossible prices — and we decided Egypt deserved better. Not an imitation of luxury. Real luxury. Built here. By us.

From the peaks of our mountain logo to every drop inside the bottle — Valyria Scent is built to make you feel like you rule the air around you.

Rule Your Air. 👑

6
Fragrances
2
Body Splashes
4
Bundle Sets

Philosophy

"Fragrance is the invisible crown
of those who dare to rule."
"العطر هو التاج الغير مرئي لمن يجرؤ على الحكم."

We do not create for the many. We create for those who understand that true luxury is felt before it is seen — and remembered long after you have gone.
